tests.name: PR-orders-api-201: get order response includes required fields
PR-orders-api-201: get order returns 404 for unknown id
PR-orders-api-201: rejects discount with missing code
PR-orders-api-201: rejects discount with zero pct
PR-orders-api-201: rejects discount with pct above maximum (91)
PR-orders-api-201: accepts discount at maximum valid pct (90)
PR-orders-api-201: returns 404 applying discount to unknown order

open_questions: Cumulative discount behavior is undefined in openapi/orders.yaml: server.js recalculates total from the fixed base 100 on every POST (not from the current discounted total) — is independent-per-call the intended contract behavior for stacked discounts?

openapi/orders.yaml contains no response schemas (fields, types) for either endpoint; field-level assertions in the new tests (id, total, discounts) are inferred from server.js implementation rather than a documented contract — should response schemas be added to the OpenAPI spec?

contract.rationale: Contract change in openapi/orders.yaml affects downstream consumer (web-storefront-ui). Existing test coverage for orders endpoints exists; tests need updates to reflect new contract. Cross-repo impact confirmed.
